name: Kometa Quickstart
description: Kometa Quickstart is more than just a YAML generator - it's a full interactive environment for configuring, validating, and running Kometa.

notes.text: Quickstart provides option to install Plex test libraries that are around 7GB in size, these are optional and can be skipped if you want to save space. It also provides option to install Kometa instance within the Quickstart folder, this is optional and can be skipped if you use it to only generate YAML files for external Kometa instance.

When updates are available the UI will prompt you to install them, this will not work and you should use the community-scripts update mechanism to update Quickstart, this is because the quickstart update process uses git to pull the latest changes instead of using the release tarball.
